reviews.comment:
Tiene 4 líneas dobles de surtidores de combustible, lo que agiliza el despacho. Aceptan tarjetas de crédito y débito Maestro (no solo Visa, como suele suceder en algunas estaciones de servicio)

(Translated by Google)
It has four double fuel pump lines, which speeds up service. They accept Maestro credit and debit cards (not just Visa, as is often the case at some gas stations).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNDc3R25nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena sucursal del ACA en la ciudad de La Plata. Algo lenta la atención por poco personal o mal uso de los tiempos y la cantidad de islas existentes

(Translated by Google)
Very good ACA branch in the city of La Plata. Service is a bit slow, perhaps due to insufficient staff or poor time management, and the number of service windows.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzeFphSURnEAE

reviews.comment:
Debe ser por lejos, el servicio mas lento de la ciudad. No importa si hay muchos o pocos autos, tardan una eternidad en atenderte.

(Translated by Google)
It has to be, by far, the slowest service in the city. It doesn't matter if there are many cars or few, they take forever to attend to you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOGV2ZE1REAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, el kiosco cierra muy temprano. Lamentablemente no hay prioridad para quienes somos socios ACA

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the kiosk closes very early. Unfortunately, there's no priority for ACA members.
